News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

  • Iraqi resistance group vows to avenge US assassination of anti-terror commander Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iraq's Nujaba resistance group has vowed to avenge the assassination of a resistance commander in a terrorist US strike.
  • Iraqi resistance says launched 27 strikes against enemy targets in a day Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Resistance in Iraq says it has conducted 27 separate operations against US bases across Iraq and the broader region within a 24-hour period.

  • Coast Guard Cutter Munro crew returns home after 119-day, multi-mission patrol; more than 20,000 pounds of cocaine seized US Coast Guard 06 Mar 2026 -- The crew of U.S. Coast Guard Cutter Munro (WMSL 755) returned to their home port in Alameda, on Sunday, following a historic 119-day multi-mission deployment spanning more than 26,000 miles from the Eastern Pacific Ocean to the Northern Atlantic.

    • Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Iranian Navy fires missile towards USS Abraham Lincoln after promise of revenge Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Navy has launched a coast-to-sea missile towards the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) aircraft carrier following a pledge by the Army to avenge those martyred during an American strike against an Iranian naval frigate.
  • IRGC deploys new-generation missiles in latest wave of Operation True Promise 4 Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced the launch of the 23rd wave of Operation True Promise 4, highlighting the deployment of new-generation missile systems against targets in the occupied territories and US bases across the region.
  • Iran welcomes, awaits US escort of oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz: IRGC spox Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iran strongly welcomes the escorting of oil tankers and the claimed presence of US forces to ensure passage through the Strait of Hormuz, a spokesperson for the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has said.
  • Iranian missiles, drones dominate skies over the occupied territories: Military spox Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iranian missiles and drones are dominating the skies over the occupied territories as the war escalates, according to the spokesperson for Iran's armed forces.
  • IRGC shatters US-Israeli propaganda with new operations to punish aggressors Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) has decisively shattered the US and Israeli propaganda of weakened Iran's defensive capabilities by effectively launching the new wave of Operation True Promise 4 to confront the barbaric US-Israeli aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran Army drone barrage strike US bases in Kuwait, satellite images reveal extensive damage Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian Army has announced a large-scale strike on US military bases in Kuwait, with satellite imagery indicating precise hits on key facilities inside the American-run Arifjan base.
  • Op. True Promise 4: Iran launches 22nd wave with new generation missiles Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has launched the 22nd wave of Operation True Promise 4 with a barrage of Khorramshahr 4, Khaibar and Fattah missiles targeting the "heart of the occupied territories," with a senior official revealing that Iran has so far used mostly decade-old missiles and is preparing new advanced weapons for a prolonged war.
  • Iran destroys US radars in UAE, Jordan, satellite images show Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Satellite images show that several US military radars in the UAE and Jordan have been successfully hit by Iranian missiles and drones as the Iranian Armed Forces continue a retaliatory campaign against American and Israeli aggression.
  • Iranian Khayber missiles pierce Tel Aviv's defenses in massive joint strike Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- IRGC aerospace forces launched the 21st wave of Operation True Promise 4 early Friday morning, utilizing swarms of suicide drones and the advanced Khayber missiles with cluster warheads to saturate and bypass the Zionist regime's multi-layered air defenses.

  • 'We will crush you': Iran Armed Forces warn Iraqi Kurdistan against cooperation with US, Israel Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The spokesman for the General Staff of Iran's Armed Forces issues a stark warning to the senior authorities in the semi-autonomous Kurdistan Region in northern Iraq against cooperating with the United States and the Israeli regime against the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran's president hails Kurds, urges action against separatists Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has praised the people of western Kordestan Province for supporting the country in the current critical juncture amid the illegal US-Israeli aggression, urging action against separatist militants.
  • US-Israeli barbaric aggression targets civilians, including children: Health ministry Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Health Ministry spokesman has called on the international community to take action against the barbaric US-Israeli aggression against the Islamic Republic, stating that they are targeting civilians, including children and healthcare workers.
  • 'Don't tie your security to Trump's lies', Qalibaf tells US allies after carrier retreat Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf has warned US allies against relying on Washington's "lies" as the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier has immediately left the battle scene and retreated after being hit by the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC).
  • Iran's response to mediation efforts is 'clear': President Pezeshkian Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has affirmed that several countries have initiated mediation efforts to halt the brutal, imposed war waged against the Islamic Republic by the United States and the Israeli regime.
  • Iran's retaliation based on its 'inherent right to legitimate self-defense': FM Araghchi Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has warned that Iran will deliver a "decisive" response to any aggressive act relying on the country's defense power and national solidarity.
  • Iran Intends to Fight US, Israel to 'Last Soldier,' Having No Other Choice - Diplomat Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- Iran intends to fight the US and Israel to the last bullet and the last soldier, as it has no other choice, Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh said on Friday.
  • Iranian President Reveals Foreign Mediation Efforts Amid Conflict with US, Israel Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- Several countries have made mediation attempts amid the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said on Friday.
  • Iran will legitimately defend itself until US-Israeli aggression ends: UN envoy Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The Iran ambassador and permanent representative to the United Nations has reiterated Iran's right to legitimate self-defense until the unprovoked and unwarranted US-Israeli aggression ends.
  • Iran warns strikes will expand as air defenses down more Israeli, US drones Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Iran says its retaliatory campaign will intensify in the coming days, with military officials vowing expanded strikes while air defenses continue to intercept Israeli and US aircraft and drones across the country.
  • 'Painful blows await': IRGC spokesman warns of long war and new initiatives Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The spokesperson for the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps says Iran is fully prepared for a "prolonged war" and is set to introduce a new generation of strategic weaponry that has not yet been seen on the battlefield.

  • White House Says US Looking At Potential Candidates To Lead Iran RFE/RL 06 Mar 2026 -- White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says the United States is looking at potential candidates to lead Iran after President Donald Trump pushed Tehran to cease its resistance.
  • 'I Have to Be Involved in the Appointment' — Trump Wants to Pick Iran's Next Leader Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said he wants Iran's leadership to be completely removed and has several candidates for the role of "a good leader."
  • No Deal With Iran Except Unconditional Surrender - Trump Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said on Friday that the United States will not sign any agreement with Iran and will accept nothing short of its unconditional surrender.
  • United States Files Civil Forfeiture Complaints Against $15M in Funds Allegedly Linked to Iranian Oil Shipping Network US Dept. of Justice 06 Mar 2026 -- The Department of Justice filed two civil forfeiture complaints today in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia against more than $15.3 million allegedly used to fund an illicit Iranian oil distribution network
  • Iranian Intelligence Agent Convicted of Terrorism and Murder for Hire in Connection with Foiled Plot to Assassinate U.S. Politicians and Government Officials US Dept. of Justice 06 Mar 2026 -- Today, a federal jury convicted Asif Merchant, also known as "Asif Raza Merchant," of murder for hire and attempting to commit an act of terrorism transcending national boundaries.
  • Republican-held U.S. House rejects war powers resolution aimed at curbing Trump's Iran attacks People's Daily 06 Mar 2026 -- The Republican-held U.S. House of Representatives on Thursday failed to pass a war powers resolution to rein in U.S. President Donald Trump's attacks on Iran, one day after a similar measure failed to advance in the Senate.
  • Trump Calls On Iran Forces To Lay Down Arms, Civilians To Revolt RFE/RL 06 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump called on members of Iran's military, police, and the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) to lay down their arms, promising "total immunity" if they abandon the country's ruling clerical establishment.

  • Statement by the Secretary-General - on the Middle East UN Secretary-General 06 Mar 2026
  • UNHCR responds to rising displacement in Middle East emergency UNHCR 06 Mar 2026 -- The significant military escalation in the Middle East has claimed civilian lives, damaged and destroyed vital infrastructure and forced hundreds of thousands of people to flee their homes, requiring an immediate response across the region.
  • On day seven of Middle East war, no let-up in suffering UN News 06 Mar 2026 -- The escalating war in the Middle East has heightened growing concerns about further civilian suffering and displacement in the region and far beyond, UN agencies said on Friday.
  • UN Relief Chief warns of 'moment of grave peril' as humanitarian crises escalate in Middle East UNOCHA 06 Mar 2026 -- Remarks at the Daily Press Briefing at UN Headquarters by Tom Fletcher, United Nations Under-Secretary-General for Humanitarian Affairs and Emergency Relief Coordinator
  • UN experts strongly condemn deadly missile strike on girls' school in Iran, call for independent investigation OHCHR 06 Mar 2026 -- UN experts* today expressed profound shock and grief after a girls' primary school in Minab, in Iran's Hormozgan province, was struck during the United States of America's and Israeli military attacks on 28 February 2026, reportedly killing at least 165 schoolgirls and injuring many others.

  • Chinese FM responds to question on what support China provides to Iran and whether it involves military support Global Times 06 Mar 2026 -- China opposes the military strikes against Iran by the US and Israel in violation of international law, and supports Iran in safeguarding its sovereignty, security, territorial integrity and national dignity, and in defending its legitimate rights and interests, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Mao Ning said on Friday.
  • FM responds to reports that China is in talks with Iran over safe passage for crude oil, Qatari LNG vessels through Strait of Hormuz Global Times 06 Mar 2026 -- When asked to comment on reports that China is in talks with Iran to allow crude oil and Qatari liquefied natural gas (LNG) vessels safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Mao Ning said on Friday that the Strait of Hormuz and its adjacent waters are vital international routes for trade in goods and energy. Maintaining security and stability in this region serves the common interests of the international community, Mao added.
  • Chinese FM responds to question on whether turbulence in the Middle East is a reason behind China's lowering of growth target Global Times 06 Mar 2026 -- When asked to comment on claims that one reason China lowered its growth target is the turbulent situation in the Middle East, which could affect energy supplies, and the uncertainty surrounding China-US relations, Foreign Ministry spokesperson Mao Ning said on Friday that Premier Li Qiang had summarized the achievements of the 14th Five-Year Plan period (2021-25) in the Government Work Report delivered yesterday. China's total economic output has reached a new level, rising by nearly 10 trillion yuan almost every year, with an increase of more than 35 trillion yuan over the past five years - equivalent to the size of a medium-sized economy, Mao said.

  • US Officials Confirm Russia Providing Targeting Intelligence To Iran In Middle East War RFE/RL 06 Mar 2026 -- US officials on March 6 told RFE/RL that Russia is providing Iran with targeting information to attack US troops and military assets in the Middle East, confirming a Washington Post report that suggested Moscow is playing a substantial if indirect part in the widening regional conflict.
  • Telephone conversation with President of the Islamic Republic of Iran Masoud Pezeshkian President of Russia 06 Mar 2026
  • Putin Holds Call With Iranian President Pezeshkian Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin held a phone call with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian and once again expressed condolences over the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, members of his family, other officials, and civilians during US-Israel aggression against Iran, the Kremlin said.
  • Kremlin Affirms Ongoing Dialogue With Iranian Leadership to Continue Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- Russia is in dialogue with Iran's leadership and plans to sustain this communication, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said on Friday
  • Russia voices concern over worsening Mideast conflict People's Daily 06 Mar 2026 -- Russia's Foreign Ministry has expressed alarm about the deteriorating situation in the Middle East.

  • DFA sees Middle East conflict lasting up to 8 weeks Philippine News Agency 06 Mar 2026 -- The ongoing conflict in the Middle East could last four to eight weeks based on initial reports received by Philippine diplomatic posts, a Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) official told senators Friday.
  • PM call with E4 leaders: 6 March 2026 Gov.UK 06 Mar 2026 -- The Prime Minister spoke to the leaders of France, Germany and Italy this morning about the situation in the Middle East.
  • Andrii Sybiha held phone talks with Minister of Foreign Affairs of Oman Badr Albusaidi Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine 06 Mar 2026
  • State Security Service exposes IRGC terror plans in Azerbaijan Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 06 Mar 2026 -- As a result of complex counterintelligence measures, the State Security Service (SSS) of the Republic of Azerbaijan has prevented acts of terrorist sabotage and the collection of intelligence information planned by the IRGC, a special service body of the Islamic Republic of Iran, in Azerbaijan.
  • Parliamentary Commission on Foreign Interference and Hybrid Threats issues statement on Iran's UAV attacks on Nakhchivan Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 06 Mar 2026 -- The Commission on Foreign Interference and Hybrid Threats of the Milli Majlis has issued a statement regarding UAV attacks on the Nakhchivan Autonomous Republic of the Republic of Azerbaijan from the territory of the Islamic Republic of Iran.
  • Egypt rejects attacks targeting Gulf states, Jordan, Iraq, Türkiye, and Azerbaijan Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 06 Mar 2026 -- Badr Abdelatty, Egypt's Minister of Foreign Affairs, International Cooperation, and Egyptian Expatriates, held a phone call with Kaja Kallas, the EU High Representative for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy to discuss relations between Egypt and the European Union as well as recent regional developments, the Egypt News Agency (MENA) reported.
  • Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan addresses drone attack on Nakhchivan, calls Iran for good neighborliness Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 06 Mar 2026 -- President of Türkiye Recep Tayyip Erdoğan has shared his thoughts on the drone attack against Azerbaijan's Nakhchivan Autonomous Republic.
  • HE GCCSG Discusses Regional Developments with the Moroccan Foreign Minister and Morocco's Condemnation of Treacherous Iranian Attacks on GCC States Gulf Cooperation Council 06 Mar 2026
  • Persian Gulf states review overseas investments as war pressure mounts after US-Israeli aggression on Iran Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- Persian Gulf states are reportedly reviewing overseas investments and financial commitments as the regional fallout from the US-Israeli aggression on Iran begins to strain budgets and long-standing economic assumptions.
  • US sinking of Iranian warship near Sri Lanka sparks wider concern; domestic criticism mounts in India over government's silence Global Times 06 Mar 2026 -- The US sinking of an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka's coast, with more than 100 people reportedly missing or dead, has brought the Middle East conflict to the Indian Ocean, triggering international reactions and growing concern over the wider spillover of the joint US-Israeli military operation against Iran, while the Indian government has also come under criticism for its silence over the sinking of the vessel, according to media reports.

  • HRH the Crown Prince, Kuwaiti Crown Prince Condemn Iranian Attacks in Phone Call SPA 06 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince Receives Phone Call from Palestinian President Expressing Support for Saudi Security Measures Following Attacks SPA 06 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, President of Djibouti Discuss Regional Military Escalation SPA 06 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Cruise Missile Intercepted and Destroyed East of Al-Kharj Governorate SPA 06 Mar 2026 -- Official Spokesperson of the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that a cruise missile was intercepted and destroyed east of Al-Kharj Governorate
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Drone Intercepted and Destroyed East of Al-Kharj Governorate SPA 06 Mar 2026 -- Official Spokesperson of the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that a drone was intercepted and destroyed east of Al-Kharj Governorate
  • Defense Ministry Spokesperson: Drone Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 06 Mar 2026 -- Official Spokesperson of the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that a drone was intercepted and destroyed in Eastern Region

  • Tears Of Joy And Sorrow: Mixed Emotions In Tehran As Toll Of War Mounts RFE/RL 06 Mar 2026 -- With Iran coming under daily attack from US and Israeli air strikes, the toll of the expanding war is adding up both physically and mentally for the country's 92 million people.

  • Dana Stroul: US, Israel Achieving Military Gains In Iran, But Political End Remains Unclear RFE/RL 06 Mar 2026 -- US and Israeli air strikes are delivering military blows against Iran, but Washington still lacks a defined political strategy for what comes after the fighting, Dana Stroul, former deputy assistant secretary of defense for the Middle East, said in an interview with Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • JIATF-401, FAA to Conduct Advanced Counter-Drone Laser Test at White Sands Missile Range DoD 06 Mar 2026 -- Joint Interagency Task Force 401 and the Federal Aviation Administration will conduct a high-energy laser test on March 7-8, 2026, to continue advancing the safe use of counter-unmanned aerial systems in the United States.
  • SETAF-AF spearheads civil-military engagement in Benin Army News 06 Mar 2026 -- A U.S. Army civil affairs team assigned to U.S. Army Southern European Task Force, Africa (SETAF-AF) recently completed a civil-military engagement in Cotonou, Benin, conducting a weeklong assessment of humanitarian assistance projects and strengthening relationships with U.S. Embassy personnel, partner forces and local communities.
  • A Celebration of Enduring Friendship and Competitive Spirit Army News 06 Mar 2026 -- In a powerful display of the enduring alliance between Germany and the United States, approximately 400 U.S. service members gathered to test their military skills and physical prowess in the 2026 German Armed Forces Proficiency Badge competition. The demanding five-day event, held from February 23-27 as a highlight of the German American Friendship Day festivities, concluded with around 220 participants earning the coveted badge.
  • Bahrain, UK, U.S. Holds Virtual C-SIPA Defence Working Group Meeting CENTCOM 06 Mar 2026 -- On March 5, representatives from the Kingdom of Bahrain, United Kingdom, and United States held a virtual meeting for the Comprehensive Security Integration and Prosperity Agreement (C-SIPA) - Defence Working Group.
  • SOUTHCOM Commander Stresses Importance of Partnership to Combat Cartels SOUTHCOM 06 Mar 2026 -- Marine Gen. Francis L. Donovan, commander of U.S. Southern Command (USSOUTHCOM), joined Secretary of War Pete Hegseth during the first-ever Americas Counter Cartel Conference March 5 at SOUTHCOM headquarters in Doral, Florida, March 5, to engage with top defense and security leaders from the Western Hemisphere.
  • George H.W. Bush Carrier Strike Group Completes COMPTUEX US Navy 06 Mar 2026 -- The Sailors, ships, squadrons and staffs of the George H.W. Bush Carrier Strike Group (GHWBCSG) successfully completed Composite Training Unit Exercise (COMPTUEX) March 5, 2026.
  • U.S. Navy to Christen Future USNS Hector A. Cafferata Jr. US Navy Press Release 06 Mar 2026 -- The U.S. Navy will christen the final Expeditionary Sea Base (ESB) ship, the future USNS Hector A. Cafferata Jr. (ESB 8) during a ceremony at General Dynamics (GD) NASSCO Shipyard, Saturday, March 7 at 9:00 a.m. (PDT).
  • Exercise Cobra Gold ends for Washington Guard, Thailand Partners Army News 06 Mar 2026 -- The joint annual military Exercise Cobra Gold 2026, held in Thailand, has successfully concluded after two weeks of intensive training, humanitarian efforts and cultural exchanges.

  • Largest Allied Airpower C-A2AD collaboration to date for Eastern Sentry, from Baltics to Romania NATO Allied Air Command 06 Mar 2026 -- NATO distributed the largest presence of Airpower thus far this year for two back-to-back Allied Air Command (AIRCOM)-led Flexible Deterrent Option (FDO) training missions across NATO's Joint Operation Areas (JOAs), from the Baltics to Romania, March 4-5, 2026.
  • NATO Deputy Secretary General in Tokyo, reaffirms the strategic importance of the NATO-Japan partnership NATO 06 Mar 2026 -- On 5 and 6 March 2026, NATO Deputy Secretary General Radmila Shekerinska visited Tokyo, Japan, meeting government officials, parliamentarians and industry representatives. During her visit, Ms Shekerinska met Deputy Chief Cabinet Secretary Sato Kei, Minister of Defence Koizumi Shinjiro, Vice-Minister of Defense for International Affairs Kano Koji, State Minister for Foreign Affairs Kunimitsu Ayano, and State Minister of Economic, Trade and Industry Ino Toshiro.

  • Meeting on improving the efficiency of military hardware usage during the special military operation President of Russia 06 Mar 2026 -- The President held a meeting in the Kremlin to assess the experience and improve the efficiency of military hardware usage during the special military operation.
  • Pacific Fleet's detachment makes business call at port of Thilawa, Republic of the Union of Myanmar Russia MoD 06 Mar 2026 -- A detachment of ships of the Pacific Fleet, consisting of corvettes Sovershenny, Rezky, and the medium sea tanker Pechenga, made a business call at the port of Thilawa, the Republic of the Union of Myanmar.
  • Possibility of 'Nuclear Five' Contacts at Expert Level Being Discussed - MFA Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- On February 28, the US and Israel carried out a series of strikes on targets inside Iran, including in Tehran, with reports of destruction and civilian casualties.

  • Over 150,000 digital reports: Mission Control system simplifies drone operations control Ukraine MOD 06 Mar 2026

  • Minister Koo Urges All Political Parties to Review Budget Rationally and Support Overall Defense Operational Planning ROC MND 06 Mar 2026
  • Koo says KMT defense budget bill could derail U.S. arms procurement CNA 06 Mar 2026 -- Defense Minister Wellington Koo (顧立雄) warned Friday that a special defense budget bill unveiled by the opposition Kuomintang (KMT) a day earlier could derail the procurement of five weapons systems approved by Washington for sale to Taiwan.
  • Competing bills to fund U.S. weapons purchase advance to committee CNA 06 Mar 2026 -- Three competing special budget bills proposed by the Cabinet and the opposition Kuomintang (KMT) and Taiwan People's Party (TPP) advanced to committee Friday after months of legislative deadlock over plans to acquire U.S. weapons approved for sale to Taiwan.

  • NZ Army deploys second infantry rotation to the Republic of Korea to train alongside partners New Zealand Defence Force 06 Mar 2026 -- For the second year running, a New Zealand Army infantry platoon has deployed to the Republic of Korea to train alongside Korean and United States forces.

  • EU-India: 1st Security and Defence Dialogue held in New Delhi European External Action Service (EEAS) 06 Mar 2026 -- On 6 March 2026, the first EU-India Security and Defence Dialogue was held in New Delhi. The establishment of this Dialogue builds on the momentum of the 16th EU-India Summit and advances strategic cooperation under the recent EU-India Security and Defence Partnership signed by High Representative/Vice President Kaja Kallas and Indian Minister for External Affairs Subrahmanyam Jaishankar.
  • Self-reliance is the only way to stay relevant & ready in today's global uncertainties: Raksha Mantri at Sagar Sankalp India PIB 06 Mar 2026 -- "Self-reliance is the only way to stay relevant and ready in the present era of uncertainty," said Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh while inaugurating Sagar Sankalp - Reclaiming India's Maritime Glory, a defence and maritime dialogue jointly organised by Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers (GRSE) Limited and a private media organisation in Kolkata, West Bengal on March 06, 2026
  • Indian Air Force's Sukhoi Su-30 crashes in northeastern state People's Daily 06 Mar 2026 -- A Sukhoi Su-30 MKI fighter jet of the Indian Air Force (IAF) crashed in the northeastern state of Assam, officials said Friday.

  • His Majesty's Canadian Ship Yellowknife concludes sail on Operation CARIBBE Canada 06 Mar 2026 -- His Majesty's Canadian Ship (HMCS) Yellowknife concluded its deployment on Operation CARIBBE, where it conducted detection and monitoring activities, and provided support to lawful operations against illicit drug trafficking in the Caribbean Sea.

  • Israel - Munitions and Munitions Support US Dept. of State - Bureau of Political-Military Affairs 06 Mar 2026 -- The U.S. Department of State has made a determination approving a possible Foreign Military Sale to the Government of Israel to buy Munitions and Munitions Support. The estimated total cost is $151.8 million.

  • Japan's ruling coalition proposes to ease rules on lethal arms exports People's Daily 06 Mar 2026 -- Japan's ruling coalition on Friday submitted a proposal to revise the operational guidelines of the Three Principles on Transfer of Defense Equipment and Technology, the country's framework governing arms exports, local media reported.

  • The Estonian Defence Forces practiced repelling unmanned aerial vehicles in Rutja together with Allied forces Estonia Defence Forces 06 Mar 2026 -- On Thursday, March 5, exercise Digital Shield 2.0 was conducted in Rutja, Estonia, during which units of the Estonian Defence Forces, the United States Army, and other allied forces practiced repelling unmanned aerial vehicles.

  • 1K Japanese troops to take part in Balikatan - AFP Philippine News Agency 06 Mar 2026 -- Around 1,000 Japanese military personnel will be participating in this year's iteration of the "Balikatan" exercises with US, Filipino, and other allied troops from April to May, a ranking Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) official said on Friday.

  • 'Intl community should work together to promote peace, stop war': Chinese FM on tensions between US and Spain Global Times 06 Mar 2026

  • Smotrich's son wounded as Hezbollah rockets, drones pound Israeli positions Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The son of Israeli finance minister Bezalel Smotrich was among several soldiers wounded during military activity near the Lebanese border on Friday, as Hezbollah intensified a wave of coordinated operations against Israeli positions across the southern front.

  • Death toll from Israeli strikes on Lebanon rises to 123 Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The Lebanese Health Ministry has reported that the death toll from recent Israeli strikes on Lebanon has risen to 123, following a new wave of attacks targeting Beirut's southern suburbs.

  • Statement Attributable to the Spokesperson for the Secretary-General - on UNIFIL UN Secretary-General 06 Mar 2026
  • UN experts warn against the irreversible 'de-Palestinisation' of Jerusalem OHCHR 06 Mar 2026 -- Irreparable harm is being inflicted on Jerusalem, as violence engulfs the region, and genocide continues in Gaza and spills into the West Bank, UN experts* warned today.

  • US to offer services in illegal West Bank settlements as Israel pushes for annexation Press TV 06 Mar 2026 -- The US embassy in Israeli-occupied territories has announced that it will begin providing routine consular services for American citizens in illegal settlements across the occupied West Bank.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Today's top news: Middle East, Occupied Palestinian Territory UNOCHA 06 Mar 2026

  • Türk says Pakistan-Afghanistan conflict piles 'misery on misery', pleads for dialogue OHCHR 06 Mar 2026 -- UN Human Rights Chief Volker Türk implored the Pakistan military and Afghan de facto security forces to end immediately their fighting, and to prioritise helping the millions who depend on aid and whose lives have been tormented by violence and misery for so long.

  • Syria: UN Commission of Inquiry completes Syria mission in midst of regional clashes, encouraging respect for human rights OHCHR 06 Mar 2026 -- The Commission of Inquiry on the Syrian Arab Republic visited Syria this week, ahead of its briefing to the Human Rights Council in Geneva on 13 March.

  • ICC Appeals Chamber confirms Decision on the review of Mr Duterte's detention ICC 06 Mar 2026 -- Today, 6 March 2026, the Appeals Chamber of the International Criminal Court ("ICC" or "the Court") issued a judgment rejecting the appeal of Mr Duterte against the "Decision on the review of Mr Rodrigo Roa Duterte's detention", issued on 26 January 2026, pursuant to article 60(3) of the Rome Statute.

  • Announcement of Visa Restriction Policy Targeting Individuals Undermining Peace in the Great Lakes Region US Dept. of State 06 Mar 2026 -- The Department of State will impose visa restrictions on several senior Rwandan officials for fueling instability in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC).
  • UK reaffirms commitment to peace, protection and development in the DRC UK FCDO 06 Mar 2026 -- UK Minister for Africa Jenny Chapman visited the DRC, pledging £13m for peace, aid, and support for survivors of sexual violence, while boosting clean energy, business finance, and sustainable growth.

News Reports

  • Trump fires Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem People's Daily 06 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump announced Thursday that he will replace Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem amid growing bipartisan frustration with Noem's leadership.

  • PNP tightens counter-intelligence vs. foreign-backed spies Philippine News Agency 06 Mar 2026 -- In line with the directive of President Ferdinand R. Marcos Jr. to ensure that all government institutions are secured and resistant to foreign manipulation, the Philippine National Police stepped up counter-intelligence measures across all units.

  • Suspected stateless cargo vessel seized in the Baltic Sea - investigation is ongoing Swedish Coast Guard 06 Mar 2026 -- The Swedish Coast Guard took control of a cargo vessel just before 4 pm in the Baltic Sea in Swedish sea territory outside the city of Trelleborg. The vessel is sailing under false flag.

  • Japan confirms new highly pathogenic bird flu outbreak in Hokkaido People's Daily 06 Mar 2026 -- Japan's agriculture ministry has confirmed an outbreak of highly pathogenic avian influenza at a poultry farm in Hokkaido, marking the northern prefecture's fourth case and the country's 21st outbreak this season.

  • Meeting with Governor of Nizhny Novgorod Region Gleb Nikitin President of Russia 06 Mar 2026 -- The President held a working meeting with Governor of the Nizhny Novgorod Region Gleb Nikitin.
  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Minister of Foreign Affairs of Afghanistan Amir Khan Muttaqi Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 06 Mar 2026

  • Minister of Foreign Affairs, African Cooperation and Moroccan Expatriates, MFA Nasser Bourita, held a telephone conversation on Friday, with his Russian counterpart, Mr. Sergey Lavrov, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Russian Federation. Morocco Ministry of Foreign Affairs 06 Mar 2026
  • Bessent Confirms 30-Day Waiver for India to Buy Russian Oil Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- The United States has temporarily allowed India to purchase oil from Russia stored on tankers at sea, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent confirmed.
  • Statement on the decisions by the International Paralympic Committee related to the 2026 Paralympic Winter Games Lithuania MFA 06 Mar 2026 -- Estonia, Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, Romania and Sweden firmly condemn the recent decision by the International Paralympic Committee (IPC) to allow Russian and Belarusian athletes to compete in the 2026 Paralympic Winter Games under their national flags
  • Statement on the decisions by the International Paralympic Committee related to the 2026 Paralympic Winter Games Estonia MFA 06 Mar 2026 -- Statement on the decisions by the International Paralympic Committee related to the 2026 Paralympic Winter Games
  • No Red Carpets While Missiles Fall. The Danger of Normalizing Aggression. Latvia MFA 06 Mar 2026 -- "We're entering the fifth year of Russia's full-scale, unprovoked war against Ukraine. The war has grown more technologically sophisticated and lethal. Russian missiles and drones strike Ukrainian cities every night. Russia is weaponizing the coldest winter of the decade."

  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Mao Ning's Regular Press Conference on March 6, 2026 PRC MofA 06 Mar 2026
  • Hong Kong to explore drafting its first five-year plan to align with national strategies: HKSAR Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu Global Times 06 Mar 2026 -- Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (HKSAR) Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu said on Wednesday in an exclusive interview with China News Service that Hong Kong will explore drafting its first five-year plan to better align with national development strategies, China News Service reported on Thursday. Lee came to Beijing to attend the opening meeting of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress (NPC).

  • Legislature advances part of central government budget CNA 06 Mar 2026 -- A small fraction of the government's fiscal 2026 budget, part of which covers funding for the TPass commuter initiative, cleared a second reading in the Legislature on Friday.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 06 Mar 2026

  • Military-Civilian Meetings Held in DPRK KCNA 06 Mar 2026 -- Military-civilian meetings took place in North Phyongan, South Hwanghae, Kangwon and North Hamgyong provinces and Nampho and Kaesong municipalities of the DPRK on March 4 and 5 to vow to implement the decisions of the Ninth Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea.

  • Burundi - M. Jean-Noël Barrot's conversation with his counterpart, Mr Edouard Bizimana (6 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 06 Mar 2026
  • Eswatini - M. Jean-Noël Barrot's conversation with his counterpart Ms Pholile Shakantu (6 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 06 Mar 2026
  • Burundi - M. Jean-Noël Barrot's conversation with his counterpart, Mr Edouard Bizimana (6 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 06 Mar 2026
  • Eswatini - M. Jean-Noël Barrot's conversation with his counterpart Ms Pholile Shakantu (6 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 06 Mar 2026
  • PM call with Crown Prince of Saudi Arabia, His Royal Highness Mohammed bin Salman: 6 March 2026 Gov.UK 06 Mar 2026
  • PM call with King of Bahrain: 5 March 2026 Gov.UK 06 Mar 2026
  • PM call with Prime Minister Jetten of the Netherlands: 5 March 2026 Gov.UK 06 Mar 2026

  • Japan-Israel Foreign Ministers' Telephone Meeting Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 06 Mar 2026

  • Japan-Canada Defense Ministerial Meeting Ministry of Defense of Japan 06 Mar 2026 -- On March 6 2026, commencing at 17:50 for approximately 35 minutes, Minister of Defense Koizumi held a meeting with the Hon. David J. McGuinty, Minister of National Defence of Canada.
  • Japan-Canada Summit Meeting Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 06 Mar 2026
  • Prime Minister Carney forges new Comprehensive Strategic Partnership with Japan across defence, energy, trade, and technology Prime Minister of Canada 06 Mar 2026 -- Canada is focused on what we can control - strengthening our economy at home and diversifying our partnerships abroad, including in the Indo-Pacific.
  • Joint statement on Canada-Japan Comprehensive Strategic Partnership Prime Minister of Canada 06 Mar 2026

  • Belarus: The sixth meeting of the Consultative Group with democratic forces and civil society held in Brussels European External Action Service (EEAS) 06 Mar 2026 -- On 6 March, the Consultative Group between the European Union and Belarusian democratic forces and civil society organisations held their 6th meeting, in Brussels. The EU reaffirmed its strong support for the people of Belarus and their aspirations for a democratic, independent and sovereign Belarus.

  • Gold Bars, $80 Million Cash, Arrests, Orban's Election: Hungarian-Ukrainian Bad Blood Boils Over RFE/RL 06 Mar 2026 -- When they were stopped in central Budapest this week, the two vans were carrying more than $80 million in cash and 9 kilograms of gold bars, along with seven Ukrainian citizens, who were en route from Austria to their home country.
  • Hungary to Stop Vital Supplies for Ukraine Unless Druzhba Oil Transit Revived - Orban Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- Hungary will halt the transit of essential supplies to Ukraine until it resumes oil flows via the Druzhba pipeline, Prime Minister Viktor Orban announced on Friday.
  • Zelensky's Agents Using Hungary as Cash Pipeline to Ukraine - Szijjarto Sputnik 06 Mar 2026 -- Hungary is demanding answers from Ukraine over the movement of cash across its territory, while simultaneously launching its own investigation, Foreign Minister Peter Szijjarto announced on Friday.

  • Comuniqué from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Cuba Ministry of Foreign Affairs 06 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Cuba, in response to the arbitrary, unjustified, and hostile decision of the government of the Republic of Ecuador to declare all Cuban diplomatic, consular, and administrative personnel accredited in that country persona non grata

  • Georgia: Statement by the High Representative/Vice President Kallas and Commissioner for enlargement Kos on Georgia's legislative amendments on foreign funding and political activity European External Action Service (EEAS) 06 Mar 2026
  • Georgia: Statement by High Representative/Vice President Kallas and Commissioner for Enlargement Kos on Georgia's legislative amendments on foreign funding and political activity European External Action Service (EEAS) 06 Mar 2026
  • Commission suspends visa-free travel for Georgian holders of diplomatic, service or official passports under the revised Visa Suspension Mechanism European External Action Service (EEAS) 06 Mar 2026 -- Today, the European Commission is suspending visa-free travel for holders of Georgian diplomatic, service, and official passports. They are now required to be in possession of a visa when entering the Schengen area for official purposes. It is the first time that the new reinforced visa suspension mechanism is applied. This decision follows the approval by Member States.

  • Government proposes referendum on whether to return to EU accession talks Government of Iceland 06 Mar 2026 -- The Government of Iceland has today decided to put to Althingi, the Icelandic parliament, a motion for resolution proposing to hold a referendum on 29 August 2026 on whether to resume accession talks with the European Union (EU).
